response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack work, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React product development, AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at his current role, and demonstrated depth in testing culture (TDD, trunk-based development, testing workshops). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and Git are all covered. Gaps are mostly at the framework-specific level — no explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, Kotlin, or Python — but his polyglot history (Java, C/C++, DLang, Swift, PHP) suggests these are quickly learnable rather than blockers.
strengths: 19+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work, far exceeding the 6-year bar
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, test tooling authorship, and teaching testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named on the resume despite strong general testing background
No Kotlin or Python listed, both called out in required skills (Java is present but dated)

key_factors.factor: Depth and recency of TypeScript/Node/React fullstack work
Missing Nest.js and named testing frameworks from primary stack
